title: BEM-639 dispatch tick
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
queued=[]
if queue.exists():
    for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json')):
        try:
            queued.append(json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')))
        except:
            queued.append({'path':str(p),'parse_error':True})
state={'schema_version':'dispatch_queue_tick.v1','bem':'BEM-639','status':'tick_recorded','queued_count':len(queued),'queued':queued,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:51 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem639_dispatch_queue_tick.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem639_dispatch_queue_tick.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-639 | Dispatch Queue Tick | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:51 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'This no-op task exists to trigger the updated codex-runner hook, which should process workflow_dispatch_queue after this task commits.'+sep+sep+'Queued count: '+str(len(queued))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem639_dispatch_queue_tick','cycle_id':'bem639-dispatch-queue-tick','source':'gpt_monitor','status':'tick_recorded','queued_count':len(queued),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:51 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem639_dispatch_queue_tick']={'status':'tick_recorded','state_file':str(state_file),'queued_count':len(queued),'blocker':None}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue']='tick_recorded_waiting_for_hook'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:51 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem639_dispatch_queue_tick.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-639 PASS: dispatch queue tick recorded.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Recorded no-op dispatch queue tick to trigger codex-runner workflow dispatch queue hook')
"""
